properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: A Nazarite, Consecrated life for God, A Nazarite, From God the hair don't cut, A Nazarite for life, Samson types Jesus Christ, He was the little, the little son, In the days of Eli, There was total darkness, He was lifted to counter the dark.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: There were seven apostasies, It types the Seven Church Ages, That's why God has sent the judges, Othniel was the first, It was the start, From the tribe of roaring lions, Samson was the last, From the wings of soaring eagles, A Nazarite.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: A Nazarite, Seven locks of Samson's hair A Nazarite, They were the mystery of the Seven Thunders And the Word got stolen, Corrupted and was hidden By Delilah in the ages, But here comes the time, The waiting round is over now, After the dark, the seed comes out.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: A new crop is growing out Restoration of the Word of God Get up, tightly hold on to the pillars Let me die with the Philistines The enemy that stand between A pure life consecrated to You only A Nazarite.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: A Nazarite, Brother Branham from birth he was A Nazarite, Don't drink, don't smoke nor defile There were two commissions The prophet with the eyes, 1946 to 1965, And without the eyes, 1965 to present, But the work's in the Bride.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: A new crop is growing out, Restoration of the Word of God, Bride! Separate yourself from the world Cause in Adam we all die But in Jesus we have life Identify yourselves a Nazarite

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: A new crop is growing out Restoration of the Word of God Get up, tightly hold on to the pillars Let me die with the Philistines The enemy that stand between A pure life consecrated to You only (3x) A Nazarite
